org.assertj.core.api.Assert

Package
Description
org.assertj.core.api
 

  • Uses of Assert in org.assertj.core.api

    Classes in org.assertj.core.api with type parameters of type Assert
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Assert<SELF extends Assert<SELF,ACTUAL>,ACTUAL>
    Base contract of all assertion objects: the minimum functionality that any assertion object should provide.
    interface 
    AssertFactory<T,ASSERT extends Assert<?,?>>
    A single method factory interface to create an Assert for a given value.

    Provides helper methods for navigating a list property in a generated assertion class so we can chain assertions through deeply nested models more easily.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <SELF extends Assert<? extends SELF, ? extends ACTUAL>, ACTUAL>
    SELF
    AbstractSoftAssertions.proxy(Class<SELF> assertClass, Class<ACTUAL> actualClass, ACTUAL actual)
     
    <SELF extends Assert<? extends SELF, ? extends ACTUAL>, ACTUAL>
    SELF
    SoftAssertionsProvider.proxy(Class<SELF> assertClass, Class<ACTUAL> actualClass, ACTUAL actual)
    Creates a proxied assertion class of the given type.
